whip_chain.note: Japan version sounds more like chain; international version altered

whip_morning_star.note: Sound effects altered between Japan and international versions

audio_identity.overall_style: Orchestral dark fantasy platformer with gothic atmosphere
distinctive_elements: Chain Whip audio design emphasizing metallic chains in Japanese version
Music based on previous Castlevania arrangements and new pieces
16-bit SNES audio enhancement of NES Castlevania themes

sources_used: wikipedia - Super Castlevania IV (Audio section and Development notes)
tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Audio Differences section)
notes: Documentation available is limited to audio differences between Japanese and international versions and composer credits. Specific tempo, key, chord progression, and detailed SFX characteristics per area are not documented in provided sources. Track-by-track music analysis data (tempos, keys, progressions) is not available in T2 tier documentation.
